title: SMPUtils Xtra
description: A Addon To My Other Pack SMPUtils That Adds Frequently Requested Features That Dont Belong In The Original Pack!
body:
# SMPUtils Xtra
 **A Addon To My Other Pack [SMPUtils](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smputils) That Adds Frequently Requested Features That Dont Belong In The Original Pack!**  

# Features
- Smaller Utils for food, pvp items and more
- Clear water
- Smallest shield
- Bow and Crossbow charge indicator

# README
Make sure to put this pack above SMPUtils for it to work properly and if there are any issues with this pack then DM me on discord if there are any issues with the pack, my username is hunterleviathan

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

**VanillaTweaks:** SMPUtils Xtra Uses Some Assets From [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)

All Tweaks Used From Them Are Listed Below  
- Some of the Smaller Utilities

Vanilla Tweaks Allows Usage Of Their Packs If:  
- A `Credits.txt` File Is Included In The Download  
- A Clear Mention And Link To Their Website In The Description

All Of These Permissions Are Fulfilled In This Project

You Can Read Their Terms And Conditions [Here](https://vanillatweaks.net/terms/)


</details>
